title: To have timeline and workload view in Monday mobile app
excerpt: It would be great to be able to see timeline view and workload view using the app. As of now it only supports the request boards but if an individual wants to check out jobs for them for a particular week/day then timeli…

posts.author: saumyasamadhiya (Saumya)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to see timeline view and workload view using the app. As of now it only supports the request boards but if an individual wants to check out jobs for them for a particular week/day then timeline view is really helpful in the desktop version and the same is supported in the mobile app will help ease things up for resources to plan their week

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @saumyasamadhiya!

Thanks for your request

Just to clarify, the timeline view is currently supported on iOS and Android, however with a few limitations. Are you unable to access this view at all on your end?

posts.author: saumyasamadhiya (Saumya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thanks so much for your response. And no, we are not able to view the timeline view at our end even with restrictions. Do you mind helping me out with this please.

Kind Regards,

Saumya

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: For sure! I will reach out to your via private message in the forum
